title: “Paradise Found”
positive: Fabulous 3 nights. The room was beautifully furnished, the gardens and lake are divine to spend time in. There’s a great spa / pool house which we had mostly to ourselves. The complementary wine and olive oil tours were a great way to unwind.
negative: The property has an open bar for guests, but <100yards away, in the restaurant, they charge for the exact same wine from their vineyard. Felt off.

Stayed in February 2026

title: “Stay somewhere else but make sure you visit.”
positive: The gardens are beautiful.  The staff are super friendly.  It is a well oiled machine that deals with constant day visitors and hotel guests 24/7.
negative: It's the victim of its own success.  The rooms are tired, and are in need of a make over (grouting/ painting) but they are probably so full that they don't have time to do them. The guest pool is small with not enough seats for all the guests at one time.  It was probably once a great size but then they expanded and expanded the accommodation.  We ended up sitting by the pool near the spa, which needed to be cleaned. It is very expensive to stay here.  There are major roadworks at the main entrance which have been ongoing for 2 years and are nowhere near finished. If you don't time your journey accordingly you can be sitting there for 20 mins, this makes visiting other vineyards or leaving the estate very frustrating.
raw_text:
Reviewed: 14 February 2026

It's the victim of its own success.  The rooms are tired, and are in need of a make over (grouting/ painting) but they are probably so full that they don't have time to do them. The guest pool is small with not enough seats for all the guests at one time.  It was probably once a great size but then they expanded and expanded the accommodation.  We ended up sitting by the pool near the spa, which needed to be cleaned. It is very expensive to stay here.  There are major roadworks at the main entrance which have been ongoing for 2 years and are nowhere near finished. If you don't time your journey accordingly you can be sitting there for 20 mins, this makes visiting other vineyards or leaving the estate very frustrating.

The gardens are beautiful.  The staff are super friendly.  It is a well oiled machine that deals with constant day visitors and hotel guests 24/7.

title: “What an incredible experience! Our stay was nothing short of perfect.”
positive:
One of the most incredible experiences of our lives! Our stay was absolutely perfect. We enjoyed every single activity the hotel offered—from bread-baking classes to the cellar tour, yoga and many others activities. Our room was amazing, it even had a heated bathroom floor! The variety of restaurants, with their incredible food and wine, was also a highlight. The hotel is gorgeous and the rooms are so cozy, but the highlight for us was the kindness of the entire Babylonstoren team. They were all so special and friendly.
We are especially grateful for the thoughtful surprises they prepared for our honeymoon. We can't wait to come back!
Fernanda and Filipe

title: “A highlight of our stay in South Africa. Two nights was definitely not enough! I managed to use the hot spa for a short”
positive:
Fabulous accommodation and gardens. The garden tour was very interesting, we saw things that we’d never have discovered by ourselves. Gargantuan portions in the restaurant. We needed to leave early on the last day to get to the airport and we were given a packed breakfast which was a veritable feast. 
Only thing we would have preferred was not to have set menus. As a coeliac, I was very well catered for with gluten-free options

title: “This hotel is the definition of “Unreasonable Hospitality” - you never want to leave!”
positive: We got the two bedroom cottage - it’s like having your own house. All the complimentary tours the hotel offers are amazing. The staff is so friendly and helpful. The food is insane, fresh, delicious. There are three pools, incredible walks, chickens roaming around. Every day at 5 pm someone knocks on your door to offer you an amuse bouche and in the morning they re-stock your fresh fruit in the room from the orchard. We even had two days of rain and we had the best time.
negative: Nothing. We can’t wait to come back. It’s by far our favorite hotel we’ve ever been to and we travel a lot.
